title: MSU's Grant Metrics — D-RED Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-09-11 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'MSU's Grant Metrics' presented by Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD, CRA). Reports key research-enterprise metrics for MSU, useful context for PIs seeking to position proposals around institutional strengths. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/RKFIza2pRntY0tJv32xp7aMuQfl3RG_GcqONx5OKWnr_r8cT19ct1eD2ZDpPmvds.dEuVO2_A-X2sSg0n
